name: alert
title: Alert
description: Displays an alert message with optional title and description.

docs.overview: Alert shows important messages to the user. Use for validation errors, warnings, and informational notices.
docs.usage: Alert({ title: 'Heads up', description: 'Your session will expire in 5 minutes.' })
docs.accessibility: Alerts should use appropriate ARIA roles. Ensure alert text is clear.

examples.name: default
examples.title: Default Alert
examples.code: Alert({ title: 'Heads up!', description: 'You can customize every generated file.' })

examples.name: destructive
examples.title: Destructive Alert
examples.code: Alert({ variant: 'destructive', title: 'Error', description: 'Your session has expired. Please log in again.' })

agent.summary: Alert displays important messages to the user.
layoutHints: Place above or near the related content
